data.title: PhoneX Holdings, Inc. (OTC: PXHI) news: May qualify as QSBS under Section 1202 of Internal Revenue Code.
data.description: In New York City on October 24, 2025, PhoneX Holdings, Inc. (OTC: PXHI) has informed its shareholders that the Company believes it meets the criteria outlined in Section 1202 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended, to potentially be classified as a "qualified small business." This classification could enable the Company to potentially exclude gains from the sale or exchange of "qualified small business stock" (QSBS) under Section 1202 of the Code. PhoneX Holdings, Inc. will need to fulfill all relevant requirements to solidify this designation.

data.title: CASEKOO unveils Titanium Glitter Magic Stand Pro Case for iPhone 17 Pro Max and Pro, perfect for Halloween.
data.description: In Los Angeles on October 24, 2025, a renowned global creative company, CASEKOO, introduced an exciting product tailored for tech lovers and fashionistas as Halloween approaches. The Titanium Glitter Magic Stand Pro Case designed for the latest iPhone models, the 17 Pro Max and Pro, aims to captivate consumers with its innovative features and stylish design.

data.title: Avenue Living LP offers $350M in senior unsecured debentures, due in 2028.
data.description: Today, Avenue Living disclosed the pricing of an offering known as the Offering of $350 million in total principal amount of Series B senior unsecured debentures. These Debentures are set to be issued at par with a maturity date of September 25, 2028.

data.title: Discovery Silver Corp. will release Q3 2025 results on Nov 13, 2025 and host conference call at 1:00 pm ET. Website for webcast: www.discoverysilver.com.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Discovery Silver Corp. (TSX: DSV, OTCQX: DSVSF) announced that they will disclose their financial and operational performance for the third quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, November 13, 2025. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for 1:00 pm Eastern Time on the same day. Participants can join the call using the provided telephone numbers. Additionally, the call will be streamed online on Discovery's website at www.discoverysilver.com.

data.title: Video platform Rumble collaborates with Tether to introduce Bitcoin tipping for creators, a first in its industry.
data.description: Rumble, a publicly traded video sharing and livestream platform, is introducing Bitcoin tipping for its creators. This move allows content creators on the platform to receive tips in the form of Bitcoin from their viewers. This new feature aims to provide an additional revenue stream for the creators on Rumble and capitalize on the growing popularity of cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited will discuss its 2025 third quarter results on Nov. 7, 2025 in a call accessible at 1 (800) 369-2143.
data.description: Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited (TSX: FFH and FFH.U) has scheduled a conference call on November 7, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss its third-quarter results for 2025. The results will be disclosed after the market closes on November 6, 2025 and will be published on the company's website. The conference call, comprising a company presentation and a question session, will be accessible at 1 (800) 369-2143 (Canada and U.S.) or 1 (312) 470-0063 (International) using the access code "FAIRFAX".

data.title: Elanco's Credelio™ gets FDA EUA to treat dogs for New World Screwworm before fly detected in US.276 characters.
data.description: The FDA has approved the first Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) in the U.S. for treating dogs with a newly detected disease known as NWS. This action is aimed at preparing veterinarians and pet owners with treatment options. The EUA signifies the agency's dedication to offering solutions for the disease.
French Finance Minister: The budget compromise is a necessity.

data.title: Grindr confirms receipt of take-private proposal from shareholders offering $18 per share in cash.
data.description: In West Hollywood, California, Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND) announced that its Board of Directors' Special Committee received an unsolicited take-private proposal from significant shareholders Ray Zage and James Lu to buy out the company. The proposal suggests acquiring Grindr for $18.00 per share in cash. Zage and Lu, along with their associated entities, currently hold a substantial stake in the company.

data.title: Indicator simplifies managing market risks by being checked twice for effective risk management.
data.description: Reduce your concerns about market risks and analyze your charts using a straightforward indicator that is quick to grasp. Utilize this simple tool twice to enhance your risk management strategy. This information was featured on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Enzon and Viskase modify merger agreement, with Enzon and Viskase stockholders owning 45% and 55% of the new company.
data.description: After the merger, Enzon shareholders will hold a 45% stake in the new company, while Viskase shareholders will own a 55% stake. This transaction will create a combined entity with significant market share and resources. This strategic merger aims to leverage the strengths of both companies and drive growth in the competitive market.

data.title: Tucker Carlson questions Bitcoin privacy, hints at CIA link at Turning Point USA event. (char limit: 83)
data.description: During a recent event hosted by Turning Point USA, political commentator Tucker Carlson alleged that the CIA played a role in the creation of Bitcoin. Carlson also expressed concerns over the insufficient privacy protections offered by digital currencies. The event attracted attention from the public and media, with many discussing Carlson's claims and opinions on the matter. This controversial statement by Carlson has sparked a debate within the cryptocurrency community, with some questioning the origins of Bitcoin and the level of anonymity it provides to users. The event had a significant impact, reaching a wide audience and generating discussions about the intersection of government agencies and digital financial systems.

data.title: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP) reports record quarterly earnings of $4.5 million, up from $2.9 million in 2024.
data.description: First Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCAP), the parent company of First Harrison Bank, based in Corydon, Indiana, has announced their financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025. The company reported a net income of $4.5 million, equivalent to $1.34 per diluted share. This is a significant increase from the same quarter last year, where they reported a net income of $2.9 million, or $0.87 per diluted share. The positive growth in net income showcases a substantial rise in profitability for First Capital, Inc., indicating successful financial performance during this quarter compared to the previous year.
Moody's: If suspension of 2023 pension reform extends beyond a few years, it will exacerbate the government of France's fiscal challenges.

data.title: Stocks plunged after Trump proposed additional 100% China tariffs, but futures rose post assurances; Oracle AI World discussed.
data.description: After President Trump announced significant tariffs on China late Friday, the stock market experienced a sharp decline. However, Trump reassured on Sunday that the situation would eventually stabilize. Additionally, anticipation surrounds Oracle AI World. Dow Jones Futures are showing an upward trend following Trump's statement that there will be a considerable delay before an additional 100% tariff on China is implemented.

data.title: Republicans are pushing for structural changes at the Fed as Trump reshapes board; GOP members rallying around the move.
data.description: The efforts by President Trump to influence the Federal Reserve are now impacting the composition of the central bank's board. Republican lawmakers are coming together to support significant structural changes at the Fed. This move signals a growing momentum to enact reforms that surpass the initial influence of the President on the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Ninepoint Partners' sold-out 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through LP raised $24.9 million through 999,927 Units sold at $25 each.
data.description: Ninepoint Partners LP has successfully closed the initial offering of Class A and Class F limited partnership units for their Ninepoint 2025 Short Duration Flow-Through Limited Partnership. The offering, which concluded on September 26, 2025, saw a total of 999,927 Units issued, generating $24,998,175 in gross proceeds. Each Unit was offered at a price of $25.00, with a minimum subscription requirement of 100 Units ($2,500).

data.title: Avenue Living LP closes $350m senior unsecured debenture offering.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 25, 2025, Avenue Living (2014) LP disclosed the completion of its recent transaction. The offering involved $350 million in total principal amount of Series B senior unsecured debentures, officially known as the "Debentures".
H1 results validate Roquette's strategy, showing strong performance.

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group issued successful NOK 500 million green bond with 4-year maturity, coupon of 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% p.a, oversubscribed transaction.
data.description: On September 22, 2025, Lerøy Seafood Group ASA announced the issuance of a green bond worth NOK 500 million. The bond, rated BBB+ (Stable) by Nordic Credit Rating, has a 4-year maturity and a coupon of 3-month NIBOR + 0.98% per annum. The offering was met with high demand, being significantly oversubscribed.
